/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o MangroveIPlug.component/Contents/MacOS/MangroveIPlug CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_AU.dir/MangrovePlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_AU.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/AUv2/IPlugAU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_AU.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/AUv2/IPlugAU_view_factory.mm.o  libiplug2_lib.a ../DSP/libcompressor_chain.a -framework Cocoa -framework AudioUnit -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreMIDI -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework QuartzCore -framework Carbon -framework Accelerate
